name: Fresh Corn and Sausage Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh Corn off the cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and spices together in a mixing bowl.
2. Add sausage, corn, egg yolks, and milk; mix until blended.
3. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls into oil heated to 360 - 365 degrees.
5. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes, turning to brown on all sides.
6. Drain on paper towels.
Makes about 24 fritters
